blind_holo.dispositive_control: IT Advisory SA-AP-2024-07 three-part check completed in R. Okafor hold release; payment math confirmed $215,000 retainage outstanding; Section 9.4 completion condition satisfied by PLC-DC4-2026-001; Decision Rule 4 fully satisfied
blind_holo.calibration_signal: SA-AP-2024-07 advisory uses 'false-positive' and 'system artifact' language directly in the evaluator packet. This likely enabled solo correct verdict without requiring arithmetic synthesis. Removing this language is the key design change for AP_CASE_003.
blind_holo.classification_note: Holo independently verified math, completion condition, ERP flag mechanism, and approval sequencing. Converged ALLOW unanimously. Advisory verdict language is probable solo shortcut.

benchmark_note: All models returned correct ALLOW. No false-positive failure observed. IT advisory verdict language ('false-positive DUPLICATE PAYMENT flags', 'system artifacts') is the identified design seam — it removed the synthesis requirement before solo models completed reconciliation.
publishable_reason: No solo model failed. Publishing as a precision delta would misrepresent the outcome.
design_seam_identified: IT Advisory SA-AP-2024-07 answer-key language — 'false-positive DUPLICATE PAYMENT flags' and 'flags... are system artifacts'
design_fix_for_ap_case_003: Replace advisory with neutral ERP mechanism note. Remove 'system artifact' from hold release. Remove 'ERP flag confirmed as system artifact' from AP approval. Let evaluator apply mechanism to case independently.
